# Default Template (Type 0) — fallback when none of 1–5 fit

> **Copy to use**: `cp templates/0_default.md <target-dir>/<title>.md`
> Reference: This is the catch-all template. Prefer one of Types 1–5 if it fits.
> Length target: as short as possible, as long as necessary.
>
> Delete this `> ...` guidance block after copying.
